title: Model + optimizer metadata
description: Fitted-weights table and model versions. On day zero every signal weight is 0.0 (the 'Dominance started at 0' rule) — nothing has earned weight yet. The signal_registry Node test reads weights and asserts every registry signal is present at 0.0.

models.description: Map of model name -> version string.

weights.description: Map of signal name -> fitted weight. All 0.0 on day zero.

objective.description: The optimized objective. Accuracy is reported, never optimized.

shrinkage.description: Shrinkage strength toward current weights (regularizes small samples).

notes.description: Free-form human notes about this fit.
